steps.title: Use the given $x$-value
steps.content: The first equation gives $x=10$. Substitute that into $y=x+21$: $$y=10+21.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Choice B is the value of $x$, not $y$. Choice C leaves off the added $10$, and choice A is unrelated to the substitution.
